AUTHORISED DEALER

Welcome to Fujimitsu Dynamic Private Limited

We Would like to take this opportunity to introduce our company Fujimitsu Dynamic Private Limited , registered in Dharuhera Rewari Haryana .

We are providing machine MRO spare parts as well as Importer and provider relaible solution as single window for all types of maintenance work, We are expert in repair maintenance for Ball Screw , Spindle , ATC, Cam Indexer with in 2 Micron accuracy.

Our Quality Stands for voice of customer .

We feel that we do qualify as a prospective vendor to your esteemed organization.
